proposed_hypotheses.text: Older age_years is associated with longer pfs_months (positive correlation).
Mean pfs_months differs between sex_female=1 and sex_female=0.
Mean pfs_months differs across race_ethnicity categories.
Mean pfs_months differs across insurance_type categories.
Patients with rural_residence=1 have different pfs_months than rural_residence=0.

analyses.result_summary: Pearson r=0.7661 between age_years and pfs_months (p=0.00e+00). Older patients have markedly LONGER PFS in this cohort.
One-way ANOVA across race_ethnicity (5 levels): F=0.872, p=0.479. Means range 4.273–4.407.
One-way ANOVA across insurance_type (4 levels): F=1.475, p=0.219. Means range 4.249–4.330.
Mean PFS rural=4.331 vs non-rural=4.307; diff=0.024 mo, p=0.339.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ecog_ps is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative trend across 0/1/2).
stage_iv=1 patients have shorter pfs_months than stage_iv=0 patients.
More prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Longer years_since_diagnosis is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS stage IV=3.703 vs not stage IV=5.055; diff=-1.352 mo, p=0.00e+00.
Pearson r=0.0039 between prior_lines_of_therapy and PFS (p=0.388). No meaningful association.
Pearson r=0.0066 between years_since_diagnosis and PFS (p=0.142).

proposed_hypotheses.text: right_sided_primary=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than right_sided_primary=0.
kras_mutation=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than kras_mutation=0.
nras_mutation=1 is associated with different pfs_months than nras_mutation=0.
braf_v600e=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than braf_v600e=0.
msi_high=1 is associated with different pfs_months than msi_high=0.
her2_amplified=1 is associated with different pfs_months than her2_amplified=0.
ntrk_fusion=1 is associated with different pfs_months than ntrk_fusion=0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS right_sided_primary=1: 4.114 (n=17657) vs =0: 4.419 (n=32343); diff=-0.305 mo, p=1.04e-49.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_cetuximab=1 have different pfs_months than patients with treatment_cetuximab=0 (unadjusted).
Patients receiving treatment_bevacizumab=1 have different pfs_months than patients with treatment_bevacizumab=0 (unadjusted).
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab=1 have different pfs_months than patients with treatment_pembrolizumab=0 (unadjusted).
Patients receiving treatment_encorafenib=1 have different pfs_months than patients with treatment_encorafenib=0 (unadjusted).
Patients receiving treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib=1 have different pfs_months than patients with treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib=0 (unadjusted).
Patients receiving treatment_regorafenib=1 have different pfs_months than patients with treatment_regorafenib=0 (unadjusted).

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS on treatment_cetuximab=4.285 (n=15078) vs off=4.323 (n=34922); diff=-0.038 mo, p=8.80e-02.
Mean PFS on treatment_bevacizumab=4.301 (n=22383) vs off=4.320 (n=27617); diff=-0.019 mo, p=3.54e-01.
Mean PFS on treatment_pembrolizumab=4.316 (n=7660) vs off=4.311 (n=42340); diff=0.005 mo, p=8.56e-01.
Mean PFS on treatment_encorafenib=4.316 (n=5111) vs off=4.311 (n=44889); diff=0.005 mo, p=8.73e-01.
Mean PFS on treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib=4.271 (n=4033) vs off=4.315 (n=45967); diff=-0.044 mo, p=2.44e-01.
Mean PFS on treatment_regorafenib=5.089 (n=10022) vs off=4.117 (n=39978); diff=0.972 mo, p=1.71e-216.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_cetuximab effect on pfs_months is modified by kras_mutation: benefit (positive) is greater in kras_mutation=0 (RAS wild-type) than in kras_mutation=1 — interaction coefficient is negative.
Within kras_mutation=0 patients, treatment_cetuximab=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than treatment_cetuximab=0.
Within kras_mutation=1 patients, treatment_cetuximab=1 is associated with shorter or equal pfs_months than treatment_cetuximab=0.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction treatment_cetuximab:kras_mutation coef=0.023 (p=0.264); main cetux coef=-0.023 (p=0.080).
In KRAS-WT: PFS on cetux=4.415 (n=8821) vs off=4.463 (n=20281); diff=-0.048, p=0.122.
In KRAS-mutant: PFS on cetux=4.102 (n=6257) vs off=4.130 (n=14641); diff=-0.028, p=0.376.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_cetuximab effect is modified by braf_v600e: benefit is reduced (interaction coef negative) in braf_v600e=1.
treatment_cetuximab effect on pfs_months is modified by right_sided_primary: benefit is greater in left-sided (right_sided_primary=0) — interaction coef negative.
Within right_sided_primary=0 patients, treatment_cetuximab is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within right_sided_primary=1 patients, treatment_cetuximab shows weaker or absent benefit.
In the doubly-selected subgroup kras_mutation=0 AND right_sided_primary=0, treatment_cetuximab is associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: KRAS-WT & left-sided: PFS cetux=4.577 (n=5780) vs no=4.642 (n=13073); diff=-0.065, p=0.109.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_pembrolizumab effect on pfs_months is modified by msi_high: benefit is greater (interaction coef positive) in msi_high=1.
Within msi_high=1 patients, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within msi_high=0 (MSS) patients, treatment_pembrolizumab does not improve pfs_months.
treatment_encorafenib effect on pfs_months is modified by braf_v600e: benefit is greater (interaction coef positive) in braf_v600e=1.
Within braf_v600e=1 patients, treatment_encorafenib is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within braf_v600e=0 patients, treatment_encorafenib has no PFS benefit.
treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib effect on pfs_months is modified by her2_amplified: benefit is greater (interaction coef positive) in her2_amplified=1.
Within her2_amplified=1 patients, treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within her2_amplified=0 patients, treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib has no PFS benefit.
Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months (positive correlation).
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative correlation).
Higher cea_ng_ml is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher nlr is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher alkaline_phosphatase_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Patients with diabetes_mellitus=1 have different pfs_months than those with diabetes_mellitus=0.

Patients with prior_malignancy=1 have different pfs_months than those with prior_malignancy=0.

Patients with liver_mets=1 have shorter pfs_months than those with liver_mets=0.
Patients with bone_mets=1 have shorter pfs_months than those with bone_mets=0.
Patients with adrenal_mets=1 have shorter pfs_months than those with adrenal_mets=0.

At least one snp_* genotype variable shows a significant main-effect association with pfs_months at p<0.05.

analyses.code: Pearson r vs pfs_months for each snp_* variable
analyses.result_summary: Of 27 SNPs tested by Pearson r, 3 achieved p<0.05 (expected ~1 under null). Strongest: snp_rs1050828 r=0.0108 p=1.53e-02.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for ecog_ps, stage_iv, age_years, and other treatments, treatment_regorafenib has a positive coefficient on pfs_months (longer PFS).
After adjusting for ecog_ps, stage_iv, age_years, treatment_cetuximab has no meaningful main effect on pfs_months.
After adjustment, treatment_bevacizumab has no meaningful main effect on pfs_months.
After adjustment, treatment_pembrolizumab has no meaningful main effect on pfs_months.
After adjustment, treatment_encorafenib has no meaningful main effect on pfs_months.
After adjustment, treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib has no meaningful main effect on pfs_months.

analyses.code: smf.ols(adjusted formula); extract coef for treatment_regorafenib
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted treatment_regorafenib coef=0.9352 mo (p=0.000); CI not shown.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted treatment_cetuximab coef=-0.0104 mo (p=0.270); CI not shown.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_regorafenib's PFS benefit is modified by ecog_ps: the benefit is larger (more positive) in higher-ECOG patients (interaction coef positive).
treatment_regorafenib's PFS benefit is modified by stage_iv (interaction coef nonzero).
treatment_regorafenib's PFS benefit interacts with age_years (interaction coef nonzero).
treatment_regorafenib's PFS benefit is modified by kras_mutation (interaction coef nonzero).
Within ecog_ps=2 patients, treatment_regorafenib is associated with longer pfs_months than no regorafenib.
Older age modifies the effect of treatment_cetuximab on pfs_months (interaction coef nonzero).
Older age modifies the effect of treatment_bevacizumab on pfs_months (interaction coef nonzero).
Older age modifies the effect of treatment_pembrolizumab on pfs_months (interaction coef nonzero).
Higher ecog_ps modifies the effect of treatment_bevacizumab on pfs_months (interaction coef nonzero).
Higher ecog_ps modifies the effect of treatment_cetuximab on pfs_months (interaction coef nonzero).
Higher ecog_ps modifies the effect of treatment_pembrolizumab on pfs_months (interaction coef nonzero).
After adjusting for ecog_ps, stage_iv, age_years, kras_mutation and braf_v600e, nras_mutation=1 is still associated with LONGER pfs_months (positive coefficient).
Within kras_mutation=0 patients, nras_mutation=1 patients have different pfs_months than nras_mutation=0 patients.
After adjustment, kras_mutation=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative coefficient).
After adjustment, braf_v600e=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative coefficient).
After adjustment for KRAS, BRAF and prognostic factors, right_sided_primary=1 is still associated with shorter pfs_months.
The proportion of patients receiving treatment_regorafenib differs across race_ethnicity categories (chi-square).
The proportion of patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab differs across race_ethnicity categories.
The proportion of patients receiving treatment_regorafenib differs across insurance_type categories.
After adjusting for ecog/stage/age, insurance_type='uninsured' is associated with shorter pfs_months than other insurance categories.

analyses.result_summary: chi2=3.05, dof=4, p=0.550. Proportions on regorafenib by race: asian:0.211, black:0.201, hispanic:0.198, other:0.192, white:0.200
Adjusted C(insurance_type)[T.uninsured] coef=-0.0456 (p=0.084). Reference category: medicaid.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Age remains the dominant positive prognostic factor for pfs_months in a comprehensive multivariable model that also includes ecog, stage, biomarkers, treatments, labs, and symptoms.
albumin_g_dl retains a positive, significant association with pfs_months in the comprehensive model.
weight_loss_pct_6mo retains a negative, significant association with pfs_months in the comprehensive model.
treatment_regorafenib retains a strongly positive coefficient in the comprehensive model (~0.9 mo) — confirming a real population-level association.
treatment_bevacizumab effect on pfs_months is modified by kras_mutation (interaction coef nonzero).
treatment_bevacizumab effect on pfs_months is modified by braf_v600e (interaction coef nonzero).
treatment_bevacizumab effect on pfs_months is modified by right_sided_primary (interaction coef nonzero).
Within kras_mutation=1 patients, treatment_bevacizumab is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within right_sided_primary=1 patients, treatment_bevacizumab is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within right_sided_primary=0 patients, treatment_regorafenib is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within right_sided_primary=1 patients, treatment_regorafenib is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within kras_mutation=1 patients, treatment_regorafenib is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within kras_mutation=0 patients, treatment_regorafenib is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within msi_high=1 patients, treatment_regorafenib is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within her2_amplified=1 patients, treatment_regorafenib is associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Subgroup right_sided_primary == 0: PFS reg=5.601 (n=6524) vs no=4.121 (n=25819); diff=1.480, p=3.72e-274.
Subgroup right_sided_primary == 1: PFS reg=4.135 (n=3498) vs no=4.109 (n=14159); diff=0.026, p=5.16e-01.
Subgroup kras_mutation == 1: PFS reg=4.143 (n=4206) vs no=4.116 (n=16692); diff=0.027, p=4.56e-01.
Subgroup kras_mutation == 0: PFS reg=5.773 (n=5816) vs no=4.117 (n=23286); diff=1.656, p=6.07e-293.
Subgroup msi_high == 1: PFS reg=5.056 (n=498) vs no=4.105 (n=2015); diff=0.951, p=7.86e-12.
Subgroup her2_amplified == 1: PFS reg=4.946 (n=312) vs no=4.077 (n=1192); diff=0.869, p=7.20e-07.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within patients NOT receiving treatment_cetuximab, kras_mutation=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than kras_mutation=0 (pure prognostic effect).
Within patients receiving treatment_cetuximab, kras_mutation=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than kras_mutation=0 (similar magnitude — no predictive effect).
Within patients NOT receiving treatment_encorafenib, braf_v600e=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Within patients NOT receiving treatment_pembrolizumab, msi_high=1 has the same pfs_months as msi_high=0.

Among the six listed treatments, only treatment_regorafenib shows a positive, significant association with pfs_months in the multivariable model; treatment_cetuximab, treatment_bevacizumab, treatment_pembrolizumab, treatment_encorafenib, treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib show no significant adjusted association.
None of the canonical biomarker-treatment pairings (cetux x KRAS, pembro x MSI-H, enco x BRAF, her2tx x HER2) shows a significant predictive interaction on pfs_months in this dataset.
age_years has the largest standardized effect on pfs_months among continuous predictors in the comprehensive multivariable model.
kras_mutation, braf_v600e, and right_sided_primary each retain negative, significant prognostic associations with pfs_months after multivariable adjustment.
sex_female, race_ethnicity, insurance_type, and rural_residence have no clinically meaningful association with pfs_months overall.

analyses.code: Inspect significance of treatment coefficients in adjusted OLS
analyses.result_summary: Treatments significant at p<0.05 in adjusted OLS: ['treatment_regorafenib']. treatment_regorafenib coef=0.935 (p=0.00e+00).

analyses.code: OLS interaction tests for the four canonical CRC biomarker-treatment pairs
analyses.result_summary: Interaction p-values — treatment_cetuximabxkras_mutation: coef=0.023 p=0.264; treatment_pembrolizumabxmsi_high: coef=0.031 p=0.595; treatment_encorafenibxbraf_v600e: coef=0.003 p=0.970; treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinibxher2_amplified: coef=0.007 p=0.942. Significant predictive interactions: 0 of 4.

analyses.code: Standardized OLS — features all z-scored; |beta| ranking
smf.ols('pfs_months ~ kras_mutation + braf_v600e + right_sided_primary + ecog_ps + stage_iv + age_years').fit()
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted: kras_mutation coef=-0.353 (p=4.14e-306); braf_v600e coef=-0.356 (p=1.61e-57); right_sided_primary coef=-0.284 (p=1.10e-194).

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ sex_female + C(race_ethnicity) + C(insurance_type) + rural_residence + ecog_ps + stage_iv + age_years').fit()
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted demographic coefficients (none meaningful): C(race_ethnicity)[T.black]: coef=-0.004 p=0.857; C(race_ethnicity)[T.hispanic]: coef=-0.021 p=0.341; C(race_ethnicity)[T.other]: coef=0.013 p=0.728; C(race_ethnicity)[T.white]: coef=-0.017 p=0.398; C(insurance_type)[T.medicare]: coef=0.002 p=0.882; C(insurance_type)[T.private]: coef=0.006 p=0.694; C(insurance_type)[T.uninsured]: coef=-0.046 p=0.082; sex_female: coef=0.006 p=0.551; rural_residence: coef=-0.006 p=0.590
